title: Refactor OCP-023 (OCP): Conditional logic for special class types (anonymous, local, record) violates...

detected_issue.description: Conditional logic for special class types (anonymous, local, record) violates OCP.
detected_issue.reasoning: The `create()` method contains `if` checks for `ReflectionHelper.isAnonymousOrNonStaticLocal` and `ReflectionHelper.isRecord`. If new special class types requiring different reflection-based serialization/deserialization handling were introduced, this method would need modification to include new `if` branches, violating OCP.

fix_logic.summary: Introduce a strategy-based approach for handling special class types in ReflectiveTypeAdapterFactory
fix_logic.rationale: Replaced hardcoded if-checks with a list of TypeAdapterStrategy implementations to allow adding new special class types without modifying the core create() method.
